beat.title: Breakfast in the Hold
beat.boundaryReason: Opening recap and the first ruined-barracks search form one continuous scene.
dateEvidence: The session manifest starts on 1748-04-13 and the party is finishing breakfast.

sourceLines.text: Okay, so
In an abandoned fortress perched above a river valley, a group of adventurers are finishing a late breakfast.
sourceLines.raw: [u0002 | 00:00:09.030-00:00:16.680 | DM] In an abandoned fortress perched above a river valley, a group of adventurers are finishing a late breakfast.

sourceLines.text: Earlier this morning, the same castle was filled with sounds of battle as you fought against a band of gnolls and their allies who were stationed here.
sourceLines.raw: [u0003 | 00:00:18.000-00:00:26.670 | DM] Earlier this morning, the same castle was filled with sounds of battle as you fought against a band of gnolls and their allies who were stationed here.

sourceLines.text: Now, however, little moves in the castle. The sudden quiet, broken only by the cacophonous sounds of dozens and dozens of wild beasts: hyenas, dogs, mountain lions, jackals, and more, braying and howling in hunger and pain.
sourceLines.raw: [u0004 | 00:00:27.270-00:00:42.660 | DM] Now, however, little moves in the castle. The sudden quiet, broken only by the cacophonous sounds of dozens and dozens of wild beasts: hyenas, dogs, mountain lions, jackals, and more, braying and howling in hunger and pain.

sourceLines.text: Yesterday evening you defeated a demonic presence, a large horned goat headed creature with barb tail and vicious claws.
sourceLines.raw: [u0005 | 00:00:44.640-00:00:51.450 | DM] Yesterday evening you defeated a demonic presence, a large horned goat headed creature with barb tail and vicious claws.

sourceLines.text: But the black feeling in the air has not completely dissipated. Across the inner courtyard of the castle, mists drift from pools of dark water.
sourceLines.raw: [u0006 | 00:00:52.350-00:01:01.350 | DM] But the black feeling in the air has not completely dissipated. Across the inner courtyard of the castle, mists drift from pools of dark water.

sourceLines.text: Carrying the stench of rotting flesh and sulfur in the valley below the river flows sluggishly through clusters of breezed red vines and thorny bushes.
sourceLines.raw: [u0007 | 00:01:02.040-00:01:11.040 | DM] Carrying the stench of rotting flesh and sulfur in the valley below the river flows sluggishly through clusters of breezed red vines and thorny bushes.

sourceLines.text: As you eat and rest, small clues and hints of the mystery of this place drift across your minds: in the inner keep, a pile of dead antelope, some ritually desecrated by the demon before its death last night.
sourceLines.raw: [u0008 | 00:01:13.050-00:01:24.270 | DM] As you eat and rest, small clues and hints of the mystery of this place drift across your minds: in the inner keep, a pile of dead antelope, some ritually desecrated by the demon before its death last night.

sourceLines.text: In the outdoor courtyard, the dead gnolls and the leader's spear and vial of acrid hissing liquid.
sourceLines.raw: [u0009 | 00:01:25.830-00:01:32.490 | DM] In the outdoor courtyard, the dead gnolls and the leader's spear and vial of acrid hissing liquid.

sourceLines.text: The barracks and outbuildings: a locked room, crates of weapons, a ruined building with old blast marks, and ever-present the sounds of animals in distress.
